name: io.github.trackly-app/trackly
title: Trackly CLI
description: AI job search for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor. 128K+ jobs, 1,900+ companies. OAuth or stdio.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional Bearer trk_* API key for remote clients that don't support OAuth 2.1 Dynamic Client Registration. Clients that do support DCR can leave this blank — the server will guide them through an interactive OAuth flow. Create an API key at https://usetrackly.app/settings
